_comment: Sample output produced by `python src/checks.py --region us-east-1 --output json`. Each entry is a Finding dataclass instance — see src/checks.py for the canonical shape. Use this as a contract for downstream tooling that consumes the JSON output.

findings.title: Ensure no root user access key exists
findings.detail: Root account has no active access keys.

findings.title: Ensure MFA is enabled for all IAM users with console password
findings.detail: 2 IAM users have console access without MFA: alice, dev-bob

findings.title: Ensure S3 buckets are encrypted at rest
findings.detail: All 14 S3 buckets in this region have server-side encryption enabled.

findings.title: Ensure S3 Block Public Access is enabled at the account level
findings.detail: Account-level public-access block is enabled for all four settings.

findings.title: Ensure CloudTrail is enabled in all regions
findings.detail: 1 trail exists but is single-region (us-east-1 only). Multi-region trail is required.

findings.title: Ensure no security group allows ingress from 0.0.0.0/0 to remote admin ports
